nce_events/.hooks.py: app hooks — app_logo_url, page registration, etc.

nce_events/.__init__.py: module init (Frappe convention — module folder matches app name)

hierarchy_explorer/.hierarchy_explorer.js: Page entry — bootstraps layout, loads config, renders Pane 1

workspace/.nce_events.json: Workspace with link to hierarchy-explorer Page

hierarchy_explorer/.store.js: State management — panes[], selected_path[], serializePath(), restorePath()
hierarchy_explorer/.config.js: Pane configuration object (doctypes, columns, filters, sorts, joins)

ui/.PaneHeader.js: Header with summary metrics, action buttons
ui/.PaneTable.js: Table rendering with row click handlers
ui/.Actions.js: Export CSV, Export JSON, Open Record, Open Pane in new tab

css/.hierarchy_explorer.css: Pane layout, column widths, horizontal scroll, color rules

nce_events/.pyproject.toml: App metadata, frappe >=15,<17, nce_sync dependency, python >=3.10

notes: Page registered as standard Frappe Page (works identically on v15 + v16)
Workspace JSON provides sidebar link to the Page
All JS namespaced via frappe.provide('nce_events.hierarchy') — no implicit globals
No hardcoded /app routes — use frappe.utils.get_form_link() or dynamic URL building
Cross-app dependency: uses DocTypes from nce_sync (Events, Registrations, Family Members, Venues, Families)
Public JS modules are loaded by the Page entry JS, not bundled separately
Workspace JSON modified timestamp must be bumped on any change
